== Notes for [[Item:Q91151|Q91151]] ==

ID: I6873

Name: Tiberius Claudius Nero

Given Name: Tiberius Claudius

Surname: Nero

Sex: M

_UID: AE0B2AFA5118D811BE490080C8C142CC4D82

Change Date: 18 Oct 2005

Birth: 123 BC

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

Appius Claudius Nero b: 93 BC

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I6873

Possible Wikipedia page https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tiberius_Claudius_Nero_%28consul%29?wprov=sfla1

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
